name: Patria Infraestrutura Energia Core Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Em Infraestrutura
summary: Patria Infraestrutura Energia Core Fundo De Investimento Em Participacoes Em Infraestrutura is a Brazilian investment fund. The fund invests in infrastructure projects in the energy sector, providing financing for energy-related companies. PICE11 aims to generate returns for investors through its investments in the energy infrastructure sector.
